# Sallyport — Stealth browser REST API

Sallyport is a lightweight REST API wrapper around Fortress (a stealth Chromium engine). It exposes HTTP endpoints so AI agents can browse anti-bot-protected websites with simple curl commands.

## Quick setup

```bash
docker run -d --rm -p 9378:9378 fromthescope/sallyport:latest
curl -X POST http://localhost:9378/browser/start -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{}'
curl -X POST http://localhost:9378/tabs -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"url":"https://example.com","wait_ms":3000}'
```

## Key endpoints

- `GET /health` — server status
- `POST /browser/start` — launch Fortress (optional: channel, persona)
- `POST /browser/stop` — kill browser
- `POST /tabs` — open URL → tab_id + accessibility tree
- `GET /tabs/{id}/snapshot` — get page content as structured tree
- `POST /tabs/{id}/evaluate` — run JS
- `DELETE /tabs/{id}` — close tab

## Rules

1. Fortress already spoofs fingerprints in C++. Do NOT add puppeteer-stealth or JS stealth plugins.
2. Connect over CDP (:9222), NOT chromedriver.
3. Blocked probably means your IP, not the fingerprint. Use a residential proxy.

Full docs: https://github.com/melxusgid/sallyport
